initiatives.name: Maslow Project
initiatives.description: Community organization providing comprehensive support for homeless youth and families through basic needs assistance, street outreach, family advocacy, case management, and permanent supportive housing programs.

initiatives.name: Rogue Valley Mentoring
initiatives.description: Community-based mentoring organization providing support, guidance, and resources to youth through mutual aid and solidarity networks.

initiatives.name: Judi's Midnight Diner
initiatives.description: Judi's Midnight Diner is a volunteer-run project bringing a heated pop-up tent, food, and hot drinks to folks around the Rogue Valley, Oregon.

initiatives.name: Stabbin Wagon
initiatives.description: Harm reduction supplies & services in Jackson County

initiatives.name: Birds of Gaza Ashland
initiatives.description: A community art project of paper birds representing the 43,000+ lives lost in Palestine

initiatives.name: Free Palestine Rogue Valley
initiatives.description: Community effort for Palestine in the Rogue Valley. Fundraising, education, activism.

initiatives.name: Octavia's Options
initiatives.description: At Octavia's Options, our mission is to empower others and help them get into safe and stable housing by implementing the Housing First model and treating our clients with compassion through a trauma-informed lens.

initiatives.name: Sugarloaf Center
initiatives.description: An unschooling center, infoshop & all-ages community venue.

initiatives.name: Rogue Action Center
initiatives.description: Rogue Action Center is working to grow organizing power & leaders for a more just & thriving Southern Oregon.

initiatives.name: Rogue Valley Pepper Shakers
initiatives.description: We focus on protecting abortion and LGBTQ+ events and spaces.

initiatives.name: Rogue Food Unites
initiatives.description: RFU coordinates with locally-invested food businesses to provide fresh, nutritious, and shelf-stable ingredients, assembled and delivered to our communities.
